# PHIL.047 ? Christian Mysticism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** medieval_religious
**Subcategory:** christian_mysticism

**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Direct union with God; contemplative prayer; purgative-illuminative-unitive stages; dark night; ineffable experience

## Application
Seek divine union through contemplation; progress through spiritual stages; value ineffable experience; apophatic approach

## Key Values
- Divine union
- Contemplation
- Spiritual stages
- Ineffable experience
